blocks.content:
In this path, you:

- Learned how eBPF-based auto-instrumentation works
- Configured Beyla to send telemetry to Grafana Cloud
- Instrumented an application without modifying its code
- Verified and explored your distributed traces in Grafana Cloud
You now have a low-touch way to observe your applications. From here, you can build dashboards, set up alerts, or dive deeper into trace analysis with Traces Drilldown.

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Use Traces Drilldown](/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-traces/)
- [Create a dashboard](/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/create-dashboard/)
- [Learn about TraceQL](/docs/tempo/latest/traceql/)
